trending_videos.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizil

trending_videos.title: Houston Rockets at Los Angeles Lakers
trending_videos.description: The Rockets tip off against the Lakers in Game 5 of the West first round at crypto.com Arena. The Rockets won Game 4, while the Lakers lead 3-1. Amen Thompson led Houston with 23 points. DeAndre Ayton led the Lakers with 19 points but was ejected.

trending_videos.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Cinematic Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC. 

✨ Wishlist Subnautica 2 Now ✨

Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1962700/Subnautica_2/
Epic: https://store.epicgames.com/p/subnautica-2-d27f94
Xbox: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/subnautica-2/9PJPCB188SVG

🐟 Join the Community 🐟

X: https://twitter.com/Subnautica
TikTok: https://www.tiktok

trending_videos.title: America's Newsroom
trending_videos.description: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

trending_videos.title: Resident Evil - Exclusive Trailer Breakdown with Director Zach Cregger
trending_videos.description:
Weapons director Zach Cregger joins IGN to reveal all the easter eggs and references to the legendary Capcom survival-horror series in the teaser trailer for Resident Evil, which is bursting with lower case "w" weapons, terrifying t-virus monsters and, yes, zombified corpses raining down like bloody bombs over Austin Abrams as he runs for his life down the streets of Raccoon City. Cregger also details how, despite the movie's Resident Evil 2-adjacent story, the movie's structure was inspired by his favorite game in the franchise: Resident Evil 4.

Resident Evil is in theaters September 18th.

trending_videos.title: Pittsburgh Penguins at Philadelphia Flyers
trending_videos.description: Pittsburgh plays Philadelphia in Game 6 of the East first round at Xfinity Mobile Arena. Philadelphia currently leads the series 3-2. Sidney Crosby had two assists despite a brief injury. Kris Letang scored the winner in the second period.

trending_videos.title: Office Romance | Jennifer Lopez & Brett Goldstein | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
This is a rom-com that’s not safe for work… but so worth the risk.

Jennifer Lopez and Brett Goldstein lead a raunchy romantic comedy about a secret office romance and the trouble two workaholics get in when they start thinking with their hearts.

Watch the official trailer for Office Romance now.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81939823

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

Office Romance | Jennifer Lopez & Brett Goldstein | Official Trailer | Netflix

trending_videos.title: Montreal Canadiens at Tampa Bay Lightning
trending_videos.description: Montreal faces Tampa Bay in Game 5 of the East First Round at Benchmark International Arena. The series remains tied 2-2 after the Lightning won Game 4. Zachary Bolduc and Cole Caufield staked Montreal to an early 2-0 lead before Tampa Bay rallied.

Office Romance | Jennifer Lopez & Brett Goldstein | Official Trailer | Netflix

sports_content.description: Sports content also plays a significant role in trending videos, focusing on live matches or highlights.

Montreal Canadiens at Tampa Bay Lightning

news_and_information.description: News content is present but less dominant, indicating a consistent interest in current events.

nostalgia_and_music.description: Music and nostalgic content are trending, highlighting the appeal of emotional engagement.

large_brands_and_studios.description: Major entertainment studios and brands are significantly represented in trending videos.

sports_networks.description: Sports networks like ESPN are consistently capturing audience interest through live events.

news_outlets.description: Major news outlets continue to maintain a presence in trending content.

cross-category_content.description: There is an opportunity to create content that combines elements of entertainment and news, potentially capturing a broader audience.
strategies: Develop behind-the-scenes stories of trending news events with an entertainment angle.
Create analysis videos on sports events that include celebrity guest appearances or entertainment tie-ins.

localization_and_nostalgia.description: Localized content and nostalgia-driven media can attract significant viewership by tapping into emotional connections.
strategies: Produce more nostalgia-themed music videos with regional language subtitles.
Invest in content series that explore retro themes or bring back popular past series or events.

gaming_and_interactivity.description: The success of game trailers like 'Subnautica 2' points to opportunities in interactive content and gaming-related media.
strategies: Expand to include interactive live-streaming events for upcoming game releases.
Partner with game developers to provide exclusive behind-the-scenes content or early access playthroughs.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
